## Research Proposal

<!-- What do you hypothesize and why? -->

<!-- How would you test this hypothesis? -->

<!-- What do you expect to find? -->

<!-- Compute, datasets, third-party services needed -->

<!-- How does this research comply with ETHICS.md? What are the risks? -->

<!-- How long would this take? -->
